### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1

Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close

Content-Type: application/proto

X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/protocols/http2.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/2 frame parsing and stream extraction using hyperframe and hpack.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport hpack\r\nfrom hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame, DataFrame\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\nPREFACE_LEN = 24\r\nFRAME_HEADERS = 1\r\nFRAME_DATA = 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_frames(data: bytes, base_offset: int = 0) -> list[tuple[int, int, Any, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 frames. Returns list of (stream_id, frame_type, frame_obj, byte_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 9 <= len(data):\r\n        try:\r\n            frame, length = Frame.parse_frame_header(data[offset : offset + 9])\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            break\r\n        if length > 0 and offset + 9 + length > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n        payload = data[offset + 9 : offset + 9 + length] if length > 0 else b\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            frame.parse_body(memoryview(payload))\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            offset += 9 + length\r\n            continue\r\n        stream_id = getattr(frame, \"stream_id\", 0)\r\n        results.append((stream_id, frame.type, frame, base_offset + offset))\r\n        offset += 9 + length\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _headers_to_dict(headers: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    return {k.lower(): v for k, v in headers}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _decode_header_block(block: bytes) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"HPACK-decode header block. Try with optional padding byte skip.\"\"\"\r\n    for start in (0, 1, 5, 6):\r\n        if start >= len(block):\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            decoder = hpack.Decoder()\r\n            headers = decoder.decode(block[start:])\r\n            return _headers_to_dict(headers)\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            continue\r\n    return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP2Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 streams from plaintext reassembled bytes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http2\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        return c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] == HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        # Skip client preface (24 bytes) for frame parsing\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:])\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes)\r\n        # Build stream_id -> request info (offset, headers) from c2s HEADERS\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        # HEADERS frame type is 1, DATA is 0\r\n        for offset_adj, (stream_id, ft, frame, offset) in enumerate([(o + PREFACE_LEN, x) for o, x in enumerate(_parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:]))]):\r\n            real_offset = offset + PREFACE_LEN\r\n            if ft == 1 and stream_id != 0:  # HEADERS\r\n                try:\r\n                    payload = frame.data if hasattr(frame, \"data\") else bytes(frame)\r\n                    if hasattr(frame, \"data\"):\r\n                        # HeadersFrame has .data for the encoded block\r\n                        block = frame.data\r\n                    else:\r\n                        block = payload\r\n                    if isinstance(frame, HeadersFrame):\r\n                        block = frame.data\r\n                    else:\r\n                        block = getattr(frame, \"data\", payload)\r\n                    headers = _parse_headers_frame_payload(block, stream_id)\r\n                    if \":method\" in headers or \"method\" in headers:\r\n                        request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": real_offset,\r\n                            \"headers\": headers,\r\n                            \"method\": headers.get(\":method\") or headers.get(\"method\"),\r\n                            \"path\": headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\"),\r\n                            \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\") or headers.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                        }\r\n                except Exception:\r\n                    pass\r\n            elif ft == 0:  # DATA\r\n                if hasattr(frame, \"data\"):\r\n                    size = len(frame.data)\r\n                else:\r\n                    size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in _parse_frames(s2c_bytes):\r\n            if ft == 1 and stream_id != 0:\r\n                try:\r\n                    block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                    headers = _parse_headers_frame_payload(block, stream_id)\r\n                    if \":status\" in headers or \"status\" in headers:\r\n                        response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": offset,\r\n                            \"headers\": headers,\r\n                            \"status_code\": int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\")),\r\n                        }\r\n                except Exception:\r\n                    pass\r\n            elif ft == 0:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http2\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

```
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true

Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:07:22 GMT
```

```
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/protocols/http2.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"HTTP/2 frame parsing and stream extraction using hyperframe and hpack.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nimport hpack\r\nfrom hyperframe.frame import Frame, HeadersFrame, DataFrame\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\n\r\nHTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\nPREFACE_LEN = 24\r\nFRAME_HEADERS = 1\r\nFRAME_DATA = 0\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_frames(data: bytes, base_offset: int = 0) -> list[tuple[int, int, Any, int]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 frames. Returns list of (stream_id, frame_type, frame_obj, byte_offset).\"\"\"\r\n    results = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 9 <= len(data):\r\n        try:\r\n            frame, length = Frame.parse_frame_header(data[offset : offset + 9])\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            break\r\n        if length > 0 and offset + 9 + length > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n        payload = data[offset + 9 : offset + 9 + length] if length > 0 else b\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            frame.parse_body(memoryview(payload))\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            offset += 9 + length\r\n            continue\r\n        stream_id = getattr(frame, \"stream_id\", 0)\r\n        results.append((stream_id, frame.type, frame, base_offset + offset))\r\n        offset += 9 + length\r\n    return results\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _headers_to_dict(headers: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    return {k.lower(): v for k, v in headers}\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _decode_header_block(block: bytes) -> dict[str, str]:\r\n    \"\"\"HPACK-decode header block. Try with optional padding byte skip.\"\"\"\r\n    for start in (0, 1, 5, 6):\r\n        if start >= len(block):\r\n            break\r\n        try:\r\n            decoder = hpack.Decoder()\r\n            headers = decoder.decode(block[start:])\r\n            return _headers_to_dict(headers)\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            continue\r\n    return {}\r\n\r\n\r\nclass HTTP2Handler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Parse HTTP/2 streams from plaintext reassembled bytes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"http2\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        return c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] == HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        # Skip client preface (24 bytes) for frame parsing\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:])\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes)\r\n        # Build stream_id -> request info (offset, headers) from c2s HEADERS\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        # HEADERS frame type is 1, DATA is 0\r\n        for offset_adj, (stream_id, ft, frame, offset) in enumerate([(o + PREFACE_LEN, x) for o, x in enumerate(_parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:]))]):\r\n            real_offset = offset + PREFACE_LEN\r\n            if ft == 1 and stream_id != 0:  # HEADERS\r\n                try:\r\n                    payload = frame.data if hasattr(frame, \"data\") else bytes(frame)\r\n                    if hasattr(frame, \"data\"):\r\n                        # HeadersFrame has .data for the encoded block\r\n                        block = frame.data\r\n                    else:\r\n                        block = payload\r\n                    if isinstance(frame, HeadersFrame):\r\n                        block = frame.data\r\n                    else:\r\n                        block = getattr(frame, \"data\", payload)\r\n                    headers = _parse_headers_frame_payload(block, stream_id)\r\n                    if \":method\" in headers or \"method\" in headers:\r\n                        request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": real_offset,\r\n                            \"headers\": headers,\r\n                            \"method\": headers.get(\":method\") or headers.get(\"method\"),\r\n                            \"path\": headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\"),\r\n                            \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\") or headers.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                        }\r\n                except Exception:\r\n                    pass\r\n            elif ft == 0:  # DATA\r\n                if hasattr(frame, \"data\"):\r\n                    size = len(frame.data)\r\n                else:\r\n                    size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in _parse_frames(s2c_bytes):\r\n            if ft == 1 and stream_id != 0:\r\n                try:\r\n                    block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                    headers = _parse_headers_frame_payload(block, stream_id)\r\n                    if \":status\" in headers or \"status\" in headers:\r\n                        response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                            \"offset\": offset,\r\n                            \"headers\": headers,\r\n                            \"status_code\": int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\")),\r\n                        }\r\n                except Exception:\r\n                    pass\r\n            elif ft == 0:\r\n                size = len(getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\"))\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + size\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"http2\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
